4_2_collaborative_filtering.paper_comparison: algorithm sanity check; original papers use different corpora

4_3_matrix_factorization.paper_comparison: Netflix paper value is not directly comparable

4_4_factorization_machine.paper_comparison: functional reproduction; libFM paper protocols differ

4_5_gbdt_lr.paper_comparison: Facebook production corpus is proprietary; Criteo_x1 是 GBDT+LR 论文同任务（CTR + NE）的公开基准

5_2_dssm.paper_comparison: DSSM web-search click corpus is proprietary; verify structure and retrieval protocol, not absolute NDCG

5_3_mind.split: paper protocol: random 19:1 train/test; a deterministic seed records the sampled target
5_3_mind.filters: paper protocol: filter items with >=10 users, then users with >=10 items, single pass (reproduces exactly 6,271,511 samples)
5_3_mind.paper_comparison: 样本行数与论文 Table 1/2 完全一致（6,271,511），以行数为比较锚点；论文 users/items（351,356/393,801）与可复现口径（218,972/369,114）不同，不作硬校验

5_4_sasrec.filters: paper-defined iterative user/item 5-core; expected 6,040 users, 3,416 items, 999,611 actions
5_4_sasrec.split: paper protocol: leave last for test and penultimate for validation; every observed rating is implicit feedback
5_4_sasrec.model_protocol: 2 blocks, max length 200, embedding dimension 50, one attention head, dropout 0.2, Adam lr=0.001
5_4_sasrec.paper_comparison: compare with SASRec Table III only in full profile

6_3_din.paper_comparison: Alibaba corpus is proprietary; public Amazon protocol is reproducible

6_4_dien.paper_comparison: online CTR/eCPM values are not reproducible from public data

7_3_ple.split: official train file plus 1:1 validation/test split of the official test file
7_3_ple.paper_comparison: PLE reports Census-income offline experiments; Tencent online values remain proprietary

8_3_dlrm_hstu_practice.paper_comparison: use Meta public configs and identical sampled-softmax candidate count

4_6_word2vec.split: per-user chronological leave-one-out; 全量训练 + 5,000 用户种子抽样评估
4_6_word2vec.paper_comparison: word2vec 原文为文本语料；Item2Vec 为行为序列迁移应用，不与词向量论文数值比较

8_2_openonerec_practice.split: official release + benchmark_data task test sets
8_2_openonerec_practice.paper_comparison: gated 授权副本；对齐 OpenOneRec 官方 SID 目录与指令任务，只读本地副本不二次分发
